results.description:
My paramilitary buddies at Black Hawke Security think I'm a carefree guy who works hard, chugs beers and picks up beautiful women on the weekend.

I do... except I have a secret. 

PTSD has hindered me for years, but it's under control. That is, until it's triggered. These SEALs, Marines, and soldiers would understand but I need this job.

I need a purpose.

Then seductive Tiffany shows up giving me one and brings my body and soul back to life. When her life is in danger, I'm tested.

I can't fail her.

Because if I do, I won't survive this time.

THE SNIPER is book eight in the Black Hawke Security series, a steamy private security romance with spice and suspense. For readers who love alpha warriors and delicious happy ever afters. Can be read as a standalone.

For readers who've enjoyed military romances by Susan Stoker, Anna Hackett, Cora Seton, Sybil Bartel and Rebecca Yarros.
